---
title: "env_adapter.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\env_adapter.py"
loc: 32
complexity: 4
logic_score: 7.75
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 8.90
overall_score: 5.90
---

## Intent
The `env_adapter.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on HostCapability, EnvAdapter, __init__, _detect_capability, get_execution_plan. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via HostCapability, EnvAdapter, __init__, _detect_capability, get_execution_plan. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [enum](file://enum)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `HostCapability`
- `EnvAdapter`
- `__init__`
- `_detect_capability`
- `get_execution_plan`
